title: BlackboardEntry.payload — worker.heartbeat shape
description: JSON Schema for the payload JSONB column when entry_type='heartbeat' and subject='worker.heartbeat'. Posted by Worker.post_heartbeat() (delegates to BlackboardPublisher.post_heartbeat) with status='resolved'. Proves the worker is alive and constitutionally compliant. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1; ADR-011 (blackboard write boundary); src/shared/workers/blackboard_publisher.py:173. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

worker.description: Declaration name of the worker posting the heartbeat. Matches the Worker.declaration_name attribute and the .intent/workers/<name>.yaml filename stem.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the heartbeat post, as produced by datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(). Used by liveness monitoring to detect stale workers (ADR-104 D8).
